name: Vitess API
what_it_does: MySQL clustering system providing horizontal sharding, automated failover, and connection pooling through a MySQL-protocol-compatible gateway (vtgate) with REST and gRPC management APIs.
use_cases: Horizontal MySQL sharding for tables that have outgrown a single server
Automated MySQL failover and topology management at scale
Connection pooling and query routing for high-concurrency MySQL workloads
Kubernetes-native MySQL deployments with automated operations
Online schema migrations without locking at scale
not_for: Small MySQL deployments that fit on a single server
Teams without Kubernetes and distributed systems expertise
Applications requiring full MySQL feature compatibility (some SQL features unsupported)
best_when: You have MySQL tables in the hundreds of millions of rows or billions of rows and need to shard horizontally, or you need automated failover in Kubernetes without manual intervention
avoid_when: Your MySQL workload fits on a single server or you lack the operational expertise to run a distributed database layer

auth.notes: mTLS for inter-component communication; vtgate supports MySQL-protocol username/password auth; ACLs configurable per keyspace. No OAuth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Fully free, CNCF-graduated open source project (Apache 2.0)
pricing.paid_tiers: PlanetScale is a managed Vitess offering with SaaS pricing
pricing.notes: Self-hosted Vitess is free. PlanetScale provides managed Vitess with SaaS pricing. Significant operational overhead for self-hosted deployments.

performance.rate_limits: Constrained by underlying MySQL shard capacity; vtgate adds minimal overhead

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: gRPC status codes with descriptive messages; vtctld REST API returns JSON errors; MySQL protocol errors surface through vtgate as SQL errors
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: VReplication workflow operations are resumable; schema migrations support idempotent retry
known_agent_gotchas: Sharding topology changes (resharding) are long-running workflows requiring monitoring
Some MySQL SQL features are unsupported or behave differently through vtgate
vtctld (management API) and vtgate (query API) are separate endpoints with different auth
Online DDL migrations have their own state machine and completion polling requirements
Kubernetes operator (vitess-operator) required for production deployments

security_score_components.security_notes: mTLS between all Vitess components; CNCF-graduated project with active security process; ACLs per keyspace; self-hosted means operator responsible for secrets management
